LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Bind address (0.0.0.0 to listen on all interfaces)

DATA_FOLDER.description: Folder for database and data files

DB_URL.description: Database connection string. Leave empty to use SQLite.

HIBP_API_KEY.description: Have I Been Pwned API key for breach checking. Optional — leave empty to skip checks.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Token to access the admin panel at /admin. Generate with a secret generator.

ADMIN_ENABLED.description: Enable admin panel UI (set to true to enable)

SIGNUPS_VERIFY.description: Require email verification on signup. Default is false for one-click deployment.

IP_HEADER_OPTIONAL.description: Show or hide user IP in sessions (true/false)
